invariant_descriptions.IMT-0: KnowledgeBundle MUST be cryptographically signed (HMAC-SHA256) before transmission. Unsigned bundles are rejected by import_bundle() via TransferVerificationError.
invariant_descriptions.IMT-VERIFY-0: import_bundle() MUST verify HMAC signature against signing_key before any knowledge state write. Verification failure raises TransferVerificationError.
invariant_descriptions.IMT-CHAIN-0: Every import event (success or rejection) MUST be recorded in the chain-of-custody ledger (governance_events.jsonl) with full bundle provenance before return. Uses Path.open — never builtins.open.
invariant_descriptions.IMT-DETERM-0: Bundle serialization is deterministic: canonical JSON (sort_keys=True), sha256, no datetime.now(), no random, no uuid4. Identical source state produces identical bundle_hash and signature.

notes: Innovation #13 — Institutional Memory Transfer. KnowledgeBundle exports engineering wisdom (knowledge_snapshot) from a source ADAAD instance. InstitutionalMemoryTransfer.sign_bundle() applies HMAC-SHA256 provenance. import_bundle() enforces signature verification and integrity check before any write, then records a chain-of-custody event in governance_events.jsonl. World-first: cryptographically governed cross-instance knowledge transfer for autonomous software evolution engines.
